title: Include marketplace manifest
description: Generate .agents/plugins/marketplace.json so this plugin can be installed from a Git repository. Disable when adding this export to a repository that already has a shared marketplace listing multiple plugins.

title: Include README
description: Generate README.md with plugin contents and Codex installation guidance.

title: Repository URL
description: Optional repository URL written to plugin.json, .agents/plugins/marketplace.json, and README.md.

title: Installation policy
description: Written to marketplace entry policy.installation.

AVAILABLE.label: Available
AVAILABLE.description: Plugin appears in the Codex plugin directory and can be installed.

INSTALLED_BY_DEFAULT.label: Installed by default
INSTALLED_BY_DEFAULT.description: Plugin is installed automatically when the marketplace is added.

NOT_AVAILABLE.label: Not available
NOT_AVAILABLE.description: Plugin is listed but cannot be installed from the marketplace.

title: Authentication policy
description: Written to marketplace entry policy.authentication.

ON_INSTALL.label: On install
ON_INSTALL.description: Prompt for authentication when the plugin is installed.

ON_USE.label: On first use
ON_USE.description: Defer authentication until the plugin is used for the first time.

title: Include MCP server
description: Generate .mcp.json with the Supernova MCP pre-scoped to this context.

title: Include MCP usage skill
description: Generate a using-supernova-mcp skill that explains when and how to call the Supernova MCP tools.

title: Plugin name
description: Codex plugin identifier. Leave empty to use a slug of the context name.

title: Plugin version
description: Version written to .codex-plugin/plugin.json.

title: Plugin description
description: Description written to plugin.json, interface.shortDescription, and README.md. Leave empty to use the context description when available.

title: Author name
description: Author name written to plugin.json author.name and interface.developerName.

title: Author email
description: Optional author email written to plugin.json.

title: Author URL
description: Optional author URL written to plugin.json.

title: Homepage
description: Optional homepage URL written to plugin.json homepage, interface.websiteURL, and README.md. Use an absolute https:// URL when set.

title: License
description: License identifier written to plugin.json.

title: Keywords
description: Keywords written to plugin.json.

title: Display name
description: Human-readable name for interface.displayName and the marketplace title. Leave empty to use the context name.

title: Long description
description: Extended description for interface.longDescription on Codex plugin details screens.

title: Category
description: Category for interface.category and the marketplace entry category.

title: Brand color
description: Hex theme color for interface.brandColor (for example #10A37F). Leave empty to omit.

title: Privacy policy URL
description: Privacy policy URL for interface.privacyPolicyURL. Use an absolute https:// URL when set.

title: Terms of service URL
description: Terms of service URL for interface.termsOfServiceURL. Use an absolute https:// URL when set.

title: Default prompts
description: Starter prompts for interface.defaultPrompt in Codex composer. Up to 3 entries, 128 characters each.

title: Include context skills
description: Export Supernova skills selected by the current context into the plugin's skills folder.

title: Preserve folder hierarchy
description: Keep Supernova skill folders as category folders in the generated plugin. When disabled, skills are flattened and duplicate names receive numeric suffixes.

title: Include feedback skill
description: Generate the feedback capture skill only when this is enabled and feedback collection is also enabled for the context.

title: Include Supernova metadata
description: Add Supernova metadata to exported context skill frontmatter.

title: Include updated timestamp
description: Add the Supernova skill update timestamp to frontmatter metadata.

title: Include generator name
description: Add the Supernova generator name to frontmatter metadata.

title: Include generated file disclaimer
description: Add a generated-file disclaimer to frontmatter metadata.

default: This file was generated by Supernova.io and should not be changed manually.
title: Disclaimer message
description: Disclaimer text written to the supernova-disclaimer frontmatter metadata field.
